title: Silly cat panorama
description: A simple resoursepack that changes the minecraft panorama to an image of a silly kitty
body:
Silly car resoursepack changes the minecraft default panorama to an image of an cat :3

~~Even though the pack says its for 1.21.5 it should work with most minecraft version!~~

You may use this resoursepack in your own ones but if publishing **please credit me**. Thanks!
